/mingw32/bin/c++.exe -m32 -Wl,--enable-auto-import CMakeFiles/test_on_host.dir/src/main_test.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_on_host.dir/src/utils/ut_gpio.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_on_host.dir/src/utils/ut_timer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_on_host.dir/src/utils/ut_uart.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_on_host.dir/src/utils/ut_adc.cpp.o ../projectLib/CMakeFiles/projectLib.dir/src/led.c.o ../projectLib/CMakeFiles/projectLib.dir/src/timer.c.o ../projectLib/CMakeFiles/projectLib.dir/src/adc.c.o -o test_on_host.exe -Wl,--out-implib,libtest_on_host.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0  ../_deps/cpputest-build/src/CppUTest/libCppUTest.a ../_deps/cpputest-build/src/CppUTestExt/libCppUTestExt.a ../_deps/cpputest-build/src/CppUTest/libCppUTest.a
